en_title: Dispatch Developer Addresses Controversial Switch Censorship With New Patch — Though 'Some Hard Requirements From Nintendo' Remain
cn_title: 《超英派遣中心》开发商发补丁解除Switch审查，但任天堂要求仍在
subtitle: 任天堂的硬性要求
opus_summary: AdHoc Studio为《超英派遣中心》Switch版发布补丁，解锁更多裸露选项，但任天堂仍禁止性器官，日本版完全审查。开发商承认发售前未充分告知内容差异并致歉。

paragraphs.en: Dispatch developer AdHoc Studio has issued a patch to unlock more nudity options on Nintendo Switch and Switch 2, after unexpected in-game censorship was discovered by players earlier this year , prompting a huge furore .
paragraphs.cn: 《超英派遣中心》开发商AdHoc Studio发布了一个补丁，在Nintendo Switch和Switch 2上解锁更多裸露选项。此前，玩家在今年早些时候发现游戏内存在意料之外的审查，引发轩然大波。

paragraphs.en: The "HR Violations Pack" is available to download today in North America, Europe, Australia and New Zealand, and unlocks the ability to see "breasts, butts and birds (AKA, obscene gestures)."
paragraphs.cn: 「HR违规包」今日在北美、欧洲、澳大利亚和新西兰开放下载，它能让玩家看到「乳房、屁股和不雅手势」。

paragraphs.en: For those who'd still rather not see video game boobs and bums, AdHoc has also provided alternate options to its default ugly black censorship boxes: a more tasteful pixelated effect, and comedy cover-up items such as jorts. These can be chosen at will from the game's options.
paragraphs.cn: 对于那些仍然不想看到游戏里胸部和屁股的玩家，AdHoc也提供了替代默认丑陋黑色审查框的选项：一种更雅观的像素化效果，以及诸如牛仔短裤之类的搞笑遮挡物品。这些都可以在游戏选项里随时选择。

paragraphs.en: However, as AdHoc rather suggestively states, "hard requirements from Nintendo" remain. Genitalia is still banned, and Invisigal's audio during her erotic dream sequence remains muted. Oh, and nothing will change in Japan, where full censorship remains, and you don't even get to choose pixelated or jort effects.
paragraphs.cn: 不过，正如AdHoc颇有暗示性地指出的那样，「来自任天堂的硬性要求」依然存在。性器官仍然被禁止，而Invisigal在情色梦境序列中的音频也保持静音。哦，还有在日本一切都不会改变，那里仍维持完全审查，你甚至没得选像素化或牛仔短裤效果。

paragraphs.en: AdHoc has also gone into more detail on "what the f*** happened" to prompt such controversy in the first place, in an explanation shared with IGN ahead of today's update going live.
paragraphs.cn: AdHoc还进一步解释了「到底TM发生了什么」，导致最初引发如此争议，在今天更新上线前，他们与IGN分享了这份说明。

paragraphs.en: "The short version: Approaching launch and running out of time and resources, we were surprised to learn that our game would require some level of censoring in all regions, not just the few we were already planning for," AdHoc wrote. "In a difficult spot, we decided to use a single Switch build that complied with Nintendo’s strictest regional rating. This led us to deliver a more censored version of Dispatch than Switch players were expecting.
paragraphs.cn: 「简而言之：临近发售时，我们时间和资源不足，震惊地发现我们的游戏需要在所有地区进行某种程度的审查，而不仅仅是我们原本计划的那几个。」AdHoc写道，「陷入困境的我们，决定使用一个符合任天堂最严格地区评级的单一Switch构建。这导致我们交付的《超英派遣中心》版本比Switch玩家预期的审查更严格。」

paragraphs.en: "The censorship itself wasn't the only problem, though. Those of you who wishlisted, pre-ordered, or bought Dispatch on Switch did so based on what you'd seen in trailers, previews, and reviews from other platforms. The problem was we didn't make it clear enough, before you spent your money, that the version you were buying was materially different from that game. And for that we're truly sorry.
paragraphs.cn: 「但审查本身并不是唯一的问题。那些将《超英派遣中心》加入愿望单、预购或购买了Switch版的玩家，是基于在其他平台的预告片、预览和评测中看到的内容。问题在于，在你们掏钱之前，我们没有明确说明你购买的版本与那款游戏存在实质性差异。对此我们深感抱歉。」

paragraphs.en: "But you stuck with us. And the good news is that the success you all brought Dispatch gave us the opportunity to make this right, so we invested development time into creating the Switch version you all should have gotten in the first place."
paragraphs.cn: 「但你们仍然支持我们。好消息是，各位为《超英派遣中心》带来的成功让我们有机会纠正这一点，因此我们投入开发时间，做出了你们一开始就应该得到的Switch版本。」

paragraphs.en: Today's options will also roll out on PC and PS5 (and to Xbox when the game arrives there) if players want to experiment, though the game's uncensored version will remain the default experience.
paragraphs.cn: 今天上线的选项也会在PC和PS5上推出（以及未来游戏登陆Xbox时），供想尝试的玩家使用，不过游戏未经审查的版本仍将是默认体验。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN的新闻编辑。可通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系他，或在Bluesky上找到他。
